title: USDA Layer Metadata Production Contract
format_neutral_rules: contracts/document-model-productions/layer-spec.contract.json#laws — layer field set, subLayers/subLayerOffsets agreement, relocates value shape, primOrder semantics are pinned in the format-neutral production. This contract adds USDA-specific grammar dispatch and storage mapping.

included: generic layer metadata through common metadata
standalone layer documentation string metadata through common metadata

storage_mapping.subLayers: store authored asset references on the root layer spec
storage_mapping.subLayerOffsets: store one native Retiming value per subLayer item, using defaults where omitted
storage_mapping.relocates: store authored source-to-target path pairs and source-to-None deletes as native PathRef-to-PathRef entries in the canonical layerRelocates field on the root layer spec
storage_mapping.reorder rootPrims: store primOrder on the root layer spec

laws: parsing subLayers does not imply loading referenced layers
repeated offset or scale fields inside one layer offset use last-one-wins
relocate path pairs and path-to-None deletes are parsed and stored without composition-time validation
layer metadata must not be dropped because its downstream semantics are deferred
format_neutral_laws_hoisted: subLayers and subLayerOffsets must have matching lengths in storage (document-model-productions/layer-spec.contract.json#laws)
subLayerOffsets must contain native Retiming records, not dictionaries or JSON objects (document-model-productions/layer-spec.contract.json#fields.subLayerOffsets)
layerRelocates must contain path references internally, not string-keyed dictionaries or JSON objects (document-model-productions/layer-spec.contract.json#fields.layerRelocates)
relocate path pairs are parsed and stored without composition-time validation (document-model-productions/layer-spec.contract.json#laws)
golden_groups: root prim reorder sparse and repeated lists
